sentences.arabic: الصَّحْرَاءُ فِي الْأَدَبِ الْعَرَبِيِّ لَيْسَتْ مَكَانًا فَارِغًا.
sentences.translation: Pustinja u arapskoj književnosti nije prazno mjesto.
sentences.translationEn: The desert in Arabic literature is not an empty place.

sentences.arabic: الشُّعَرَاءُ الْقُدَامَى وَصَفُوا الرِّمَالَ الذَّهَبِيَّةَ وَالنُّجُومَ اللَّامِعَةَ.
sentences.translation: Stari pjesnici su opisivali zlatni pijesak i sjajne zvijezde.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient poets described the golden sands and the shining stars.

sentences.arabic: يَرَى الْكَاتِبُ فِي الصَّحْرَاء الصَّبْرَ وَالْقُوَّةَ.
sentences.translation: Pisac u pustinji vidi strpljenje i snagu.
sentences.translationEn: The writer sees patience and strength in the desert.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ مَصْدَرُ الْإِلْهَامِ لِلْكَثِيرِ مِنَ الْقِصَصِ الْكَلَاسِيكِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ona je izvor inspiracije za mnoge klasične priče.
sentences.translationEn: It is a source of inspiration for many classical stories.

sentences.arabic: نَحْنُ نَشْعُرُ بِالْهُدُوءِ عِنْدَمَا نَقْرَأُ هَذِهِ الْأَوْصَافَ.
sentences.translation: Osjećamo mir kada čitamo ove opise.
sentences.translationEn: We feel calm when we read these descriptions.
